name: Hardeeville Recreation Center
description: Hardeeville Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Hardeeville, SC. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water. Reservations are not available.

name: Riverton Pointe Golf & Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Riverton Pointe Golf & Country Club in Hardeeville, SC! There are 8 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.
